description: CompositionGrey melange rib knit sleeveless vest made of 100% premium cotton, has a square neckline, thin shoulder straps with navy blue ribbing and green piping around the armholes and neckline, distressed look graphic print on the front, printed labelling and brand tab appliqued on the backFittingComfortWash careMachine wash warm at 40 degrees with like coloursDo not bleachTumble dry lowDry cleanableLightweight with a square neck, this facit rib knit vest is crafted using pure cotton that allows the fabric to contour to your silhouette and help you stretch in ease. The thin shoulder straps with ribbing helps you show off arm definition, while the graphic print on the chest adds to rugged styling. The printed brand label on the inner neck provides abrasion-free comfort. Team this with tracks.Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
